content: Backend: update User model to support linked_student_ids (list) + preserve backwards compat
Backend: update /auth/login to accept email OR mobile phone as identifier
Backend: update all references from linked_student_id to linked_student_ids array (parent access checks)
Backend: write real_seed.py — wipe demo data across 3 branches, import 375 students into Kanpur, create Super Admin + Accountant + parent accounts
Frontend: remove demo credentials block from Login.jsx + support mobile-number login
Frontend: Users.jsx — multi-select for parent's linked students (search + add/remove chips)
Frontend: Parent Portal — add child switcher for multi-child parents
Fix school-context timing race in Users.jsx (linked children names missing)
Run real_seed and test end-to-end via testing_agent_v3
